risks.title: Event Duplication in Security File Monitoring
risks.evidence: 4 nearly identical events for /home/riad/github/kairos/src/screens/Security.tsx within 17ms window (timestamps 19:02:22.476Z - 19:02:39.030Z). Multiple events tagged as 'duplicate-event'.
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate monitoring/watcher configuration to eliminate event duplication. Review file system watchers (Chokidar, nodemon, etc.) for duplicate listeners that may cause false alerts or missed real changes.

risks.title: Security File Modifications Not Yet Verified
risks.evidence: Security-related frontend file (Security.tsx) shows code changes, but change content and intent are unverified due to event duplication masking actual modification.
risks.recommendedAction: Verify whether the Security.tsx file was actually modified or if events are spurious. Check git diff to confirm real changes exist.

opportunities.title: Improve Event Deduplication Pipeline
opportunities.evidence: Event observer generating 4 duplicate entries with duplicate-event tags, suggesting partial deduplication awareness but incomplete filtering.
opportunities.suggestedAction: Implement fingerprinting (file path + content hash + timestamp window) to merge near-duplicate events before downstream processing.

taskCandidates.title: Verify Security.tsx Actual Changes
taskCandidates.description: Run 'git diff' on Security.tsx to confirm whether file was genuinely modified or events are spurious monitoring artifacts.
taskCandidates.rationale: Security file changes require verification; current event duplication makes it unclear if changes are real.

taskCandidates.title: Audit File Watcher Configuration
taskCandidates.description: Review vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, and package.json for duplicate file watchers or glob patterns causing redundant events.
taskCandidates.rationale: 4 events in 17ms indicates monitoring infrastructure issue rather than genuine code activity.

taskCandidates.title: Implement Event Deduplication Filter
taskCandidates.description: Add deduplication logic to code-observer (fingerprint: file + window) to suppress duplicate events within 100ms threshold.
taskCandidates.rationale: Prevents alert fatigue and improves signal-to-noise ratio for actual code changes.

recommendations.title: Prioritize Duplicate Event Resolution
recommendations.rationale: Duplication undermines confidence in security monitoring. Real security changes may be missed if they occur during high-duplication periods.
recommendations.action: Before running security tests, resolve the monitoring duplication by auditing file watchers and implementing deduplication at source.
